CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-26-2018 Off Calendar

Motion For Court Judgment After Default Against Defendants In Accordance With Crc 3.1800
Off Calendar Jan-25-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514. Judge: Lynn O'Malley Taylor. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Joelle A. Berle, Esq. appeared for plaintiff K1 International, LLC, a California limited liability company.
Andrew Oliff, Owner of K1 International, LLC, was placed under oath and testified.
Jennette Qiming Ye, Shipping Supervisor for K1 International, LLC, was placed under oath but did not testify.
No appearance by the defaulted defendants Bridge International Marketing, Inc., a Delaware Corporation, Pioneer Produce, Inc., a New Jersey Corporation, Summer Wang, in her capacity as CEO of Bridge International Marketing, Inc., and as President of Pioneer Produce, Inc., or Christina Yang, in her capacity as Secretary of Pioneer Produce, Inc.
Defaults were entered against all four defendants on October 26, 2017.
DOE defendants were dismissed on November 7, 2017.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff K1 International, LLC, a California limited liability company, and against the Defaulted Defendants Bridge International Marketing, Inc., a Delaware Corporation, Pioneer Produce, Inc., a New Jersey Corporation, Summer Wang, in her capacity as CEO of Bridge International Marketing, Inc., and as President of Pioneer Produce, Inc., or Christina Yang, in her capacity as Secretary of Pioneer Produce, Inc., as follows:

Principal/Damages - $293,381.20.
Costs - $897.46, for a total judgment in the amount of $294,278.66.

Proposed judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
